name: Sausage & Apple Stuffing [for a 12-pound Turk
recipeIngredient: 2 large Apples, pared, quartered, cored, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread bread cubes on a large baking sheet; place in oven set to 250°F for 10 minutes; remove from oven; reserve.
2. Cut sausage into thick slices. Brown 5 minutes on each side in a medium-sized skillet, then break into small pieces. Cook 1 minute longer or until no trace of pink remains. Combine with bread cubes in a large bowl.
3. Pour off drippings from the skillet; measure; return 2 tablespoons. Add onions and sauté until tender. Stir in water and apples; heat to boiling. Pour over sausage mixture; add salt; toss lightly until evenly moist.
Makes approximately 10 cups.
